states.name: Alba
states.title: Unyielding Will
states.description: The first, and only, thing to be said about Scales is how stubborn she is. She has no concept of compromise. Once she's decided on a course of action, no force on Erden can stop her, and of course she won't hear a word of advice or caution either. She didn't even consult with any of her fellow villagers before inviting herself along with me. What bad luck, to be stuck with such a hard-headed partner.

states.name: Alba
states.title: Unyielding Will
states.description: The only other thing of note about my partner is her knowledge of herbal medicine. Though limited, it did save my life once. I considered my debt repaid when I gave up my wish, but she now believes she owes me a debt instead, and has invited herself along on my journey to repay it. Perhaps we'll find a cure for stubborn foolishness along the way.
